justification: The diff includes significant spurious churn by modifying build artifacts (target/ directory) and changing dependency coordinates (mysql-connector-java to mysql-connector-j, hibernate-core groupId change) without ensuring compatibility with the declared hibernate-5 target. While it removes @Autowired annotations in favor of constructor injection (a good practice), it fails to leverage any Java 21 idioms and introduces potential build/runtime issues by mixing Spring Boot 3.3.x (Jakarta EE) with Hibernate 5 (Java EE/javax.persistence) without explicit migration steps.
